item.title: Home Assistant vs OpenHAB: Best Open Source Home Automation Platform 2026
item.description: Compare Home Assistant and OpenHAB for smart home automation. Docker deployment guides, feature comparison, integration counts, and performance benchmarks for self-hosted home automation.
